rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving unresolved identifiers or removing invalid clauses
Address 'type <error>' issues by ensuring all expressions have valid types and visible identifiers
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE expressions resolve to valid types before compilation
Ensure implementation-level references are placed in appropriate implementation scopes
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree blocks
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in the same annex
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix type errors; instead, correct the expression or remove the clause
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope rules
